business.name: Kim A Tailor
business.tagline: Expert alterations in downtown Richardson — often the same day.

payments.notes: Demo build — every payment link forced to '#'. On the live client site these become client-owned Stripe Payment Links ONLY (https://buy.stripe.com/...). Card data flows to Stripe, never to this site or the agency. See docs/STRIPE_SETUP.md.

meta.notes: Concept preview — not affiliated. All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties. Variation A: classic heritage tailoring house — navy, ivory, antique gold, Cormorant Garamond display.
